§7Guide Book #18§r
§lCave Scorpion§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Large arthropod, Monster.
•§lSpawn in§r: All underground.
•§rHealth§r: 20
•§lWalk speed: 0.3§r

•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Scorpion Telson, Raw Arthropod Meat, Spider Eye, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 3
•§lMelee effect§r: Nausea §o(0:30)§r

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Cave Scorpions are silent predators that haunt narrow tunnels and cavernous voids. Their venom causes intense disorientation, turning even the most seasoned explorers into easy prey. With powerful legs to scale walls and
ceilings, they strike from the shadows when you least expect it.§’
